name: Shinkong Textile Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shinkong Textile Co.,Ltd. operates as a natural fibers manufacturer. It offers digital print, dyed fabric, reflective yarn, flannel, and bi-stretch fabric services for synthetic fibers. The company also provides base layers, mid layers, and outer wear knits; and wool textile products. Shinkong Textile Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1955 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
